tests.source_program:
define double @test_fsub_zero_fpext_chain(float %arg0) {
  %v1 = fsub float 0.000000e+00, %arg0
  %v2 = call noundef float @llvm.fabs.f32(float %v1)
  %v3 = fpext float %v2 to double
  %v4 = fadd double %v3, 5.000000e+00
  ret double %v4
}

alive2.src:
define double @test_fsub_zero_fpext_chain(float %arg0) {
  %v1 = fsub float 0.000000e+00, %arg0
  %v2 = call noundef float @llvm.fabs.f32(float %v1)
  %v3 = fpext float %v2 to double
  %v4 = fadd double %v3, 5.000000e+00
  ret double %v4
}
